sum: This mod adds a new NPC: a mage/thief elf. It features dialogs with Bioware NPCs, with the NPC, and a main quest that begins in SoA and continues in ToB.
no: This mod adds a new NPC: a mage/thief elf. It features dialogs with Bioware NPCs, with the NPC, and a main quest that begins in SoA and continues in ToB.

co.n: Optional: Install the first version of the voices for Thael.
co.tp2n: THAEL, Elfo Mago-Ladron y VELVEVLOS, Hoja Sangrienta

co.n: Opcional: Instalar primera version de las voces para Thael
co.tp2n: Opcional: Instalar primera version de las voces para Thael
